name: Best Friend Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Best Friend Technology Co., Ltd manufactures and sells printed circuit boards (PCBs). It offers flex PCBs; and rigid PCBs, such as wireless WIFI, projector, light, and power system drive boards, as well as solar panels. The company was formerly known as Yeti Electronics Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Best Friend Technology Co., Ltd in June 2008. Best Friend Technology Co., Ltd was founded in 1983 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
